questions.question: How can AI help with writing professional emails?
options: It writes emails without any input from you
Draft emails based on your key points, tone, and recipient
Only for marketing departments
AI emails always sound robotic
questions.explanation: AI can draft polished professional emails when you provide the key points and desired tone. It saves time while maintaining a professional standard.

questions.question: What's a good way to use AI for a job interview?
options: Have AI attend the interview for you
Practice answering questions, research the company, and prepare talking points
AI can only write resumes
It's considered cheating to prepare with AI
questions.explanation: AI is an excellent interview prep tool — it can generate likely interview questions for your role, help you structure strong answers, and research company background.

questions.question: Can AI help with data analysis at work?
options: Only for data scientists
Explain data concepts, help interpret results, and suggest visualizations
AI can't handle numbers
Only works with raw code
questions.explanation: Even without coding skills, you can describe your data to AI and get help understanding trends, choosing chart types, and interpreting results in plain language.

questions.question: How should you use AI-generated work content?
options: Submit it exactly as AI wrote it
Use it as a starting point, then review, edit, and add your expertise before submitting
Never use AI for work
AI content is always perfect
questions.explanation: AI output should always be reviewed and personalized. Your domain expertise, company knowledge, and critical thinking are what make the final product valuable.

questions.question: What's a practical AI use case for customer service?
options: Replace all customer service staff
Draft responses to common inquiries, summarize tickets, and suggest solutions
AI can only handle complaints
It only works in large companies
questions.explanation: AI can speed up customer service by drafting response templates, summarizing complex customer issues, and suggesting solutions based on similar past cases.

questions.question: How can AI help with presentations?
options: Design the entire presentation automatically
Help structure content, suggest talking points, create outlines, and write speaker notes
Only for graphic designers
AI can't help with presentations
questions.explanation: AI excels at structuring complex information into clear presentations. It can create outlines, suggest key points for each slide, and draft speaker notes based on your topic.

questions.question: What's the best approach to using AI for project management?
options: Let AI manage the entire project
Use it to create timelines, break down tasks, identify risks, and draft status reports
AI is useless for management
Only for PMs with technical backgrounds
questions.explanation: AI can help project managers by generating task breakdowns, creating realistic timelines, identifying potential risks, and drafting communication updates — all saving significant planning time.

questions.question: Is it ethical to use AI at work?
options: Never — it's always wrong
Generally yes, as long as you're transparent with your employer and verify the output
Only if your boss doesn't know
Ethics don't apply to AI tools
questions.explanation: Using AI at work is generally ethical when you're transparent about it, take responsibility for the final output, and your company doesn't have policies against it. Always check your workplace guidelines.

questions.question: How can AI help with market research?
options: It can predict future stock prices
Summarize industry trends, compare competitors, and generate research frameworks
AI can only do surveys
Market research doesn't benefit from AI
questions.explanation: AI can quickly summarize industry reports, identify competitive positioning, generate survey questions, and create research frameworks — dramatically speeding up the research phase.

questions.question: What's the most important thing when using AI for work tasks?
options: Copy-paste AI output without changes
Always review and add your own expertise, verify accuracy, and take responsibility for the final deliverable
Hide that you used AI
Only use AI for small tasks
questions.explanation: Professional accountability is key. AI is a productivity tool — you're still responsible for the quality and accuracy of your work. Review everything, add your expertise, and own the final output.
